title: Alike's Clear Water
description: More transparent and clean looking water.
body:
This resource pack **makes water look more clean from both under and above it**. Highly recommended for pools.

If it says broken or incompatible, ignore it. I tested it and if you downloaded it for the correct version, it will work.

NOTE: versions under 1.21.6 will not have fog lessened underwater. **If the resource pack fails to load, try downloading a version under 1.21.6**

[Bedrock Version (Curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/alikes-clear-water)
